mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product_review WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM product_review WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT pr.*, u.username as user_name FROM product_review pr LEFT JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id WHERE pr.product_id = #{productId} AND pr.status = 1 ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC

SELECT pr.*, u.username as user_name FROM product_review pr INNER JOIN product p ON pr.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id WHERE p.seller_id = #{sellerId} AND pr.status = 1
AND (pr.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pr.images LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC

SELECT pr.*, u.username as user_name FROM product_review pr INNER JOIN product p ON pr.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id WHERE p.seller_id = #{sellerId} AND pr.status = 1 ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC
